name: Rock Tech Lithium Inc.
summary: Rock Tech Lithium Inc. engages in the exploration and development of mineral properties. The company holds a 100% interest in the Georgia Lake lithium project comprising 273 claim units and 41 mining leases located in the Thunder Bay Mining District of Ontario. It also has an option to acquire a 100% interest in the El Nogalito lithium project situated in Sonora, Mexico. The company was formerly known as Rock Tech Resources Inc. and changed its name to Rock Tech Lithium Inc. in April 2010. Rock Tech Lithium Inc. is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
